recommendations.title: Hunger
recommendations.overview: A talented young street-food cook pushes herself to the limit after accepting an invitation to train under an infamous and ruthless chef.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: I Hate Valentine's Day
recommendations.overview: A love story set in Manhattan, where a florist who abides by a strict five-date-limit with any man finds herself wanting more with the new restaurateur in town.

recommendations.title: Wild Child
recommendations.overview: Sixteen-year-old Poppy has everything her unlimited credit cards can buy, and a spoiled attitude to match. After a final thoughtless prank, her exasperated father ships her off to boarding school in England. There, Poppy meets her match in a stern he

recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: Haute Cuisine
recommendations.overview: The story of Danièle Delpeuch and how she was appointed as the private chef for François Mitterrand.

recommendations.title: Little Boy
recommendations.overview: An eight-year-old boy is willing to do whatever it takes to end World War II so he can bring his father home. The story reveals the indescribable love a father has for his little boy and the love a son has for his father.

recommendations.title: Dave Chappelle: Sticks & Stones
recommendations.overview: Dave Chappelle takes on gun culture, the opioid crisis and the tidal wave of celebrity scandals in this defiant stand-up special.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Surf's Up
